steps.label: Bi / Be
steps.narration: You know Ba. To make it Bi or Be, we add a mark called a kudlit ABOVE the character.

steps.label: Bi / Be
steps.prompt: Draw the character Ba, then add the dot on top.

steps.label: Bu / Bo
steps.narration: To make it Bu or Bo, we place the kudlit BELOW the character.

steps.label: Bu / Bo
steps.prompt: Draw the character Ba, then add the dot on the bottom.

steps.label: Bu / Bo
steps.successFeedback: Tama! You know how to use the kudlit.
